site.title: Lucas del Villar - Programmer and Full Stack Developer
site.description: This is my personal website. Here you can see in detail my experience, projects and skills.

hero.title: I'm Lucas
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
hero.description2: Computer Science Student and Software Developer
hero.description3: from Madrid, Spain 🇪🇸. Specialised in backend and process automation.

june_2025.title: Got my first job
june_2025.description: I started working in a firm as a software developer, specialised in Robotic Process Automation (RPA). My job consists of optimising business processes delivering a full stack solution.

september_2022.title: Started my degree
september_2022.description: I started to study a Bachelor Degree in Computer Science and Engineering at University Carlos III de Madrid. Additionally, I am constantly self-studying by working on full stack projects and obtaining certifications in different areas.

2019.title: Started coding
2019.description: I started programming at the age of 15, when I began learning the fundamentals of cybersecurity and ethical hacking. From there, I started exploring and learning about other fields, and in 2022 I decided to focus on full stack development.

veritrust.title: VeriTrust - AI medical misinformation detector
veritrust.description: AI-powered tool that analyzes medical claims through a multi-agent pipeline and returns verdicts with confidence scores and supporting biomedical sources. Built with Next.js, FastAPI and LangGraph.

kmpe.title: Kilómetros por Explorar - A travel landing page
kmpe.description: Landing page of my project with my partner, a travel planning business. Developed with Astro, Preact and Tailwind CSS, integrating client-side islands.

notes_app.title: SnapNotes - A web-based notes app
notes_app.description: A web-based app that allows users to manage notes with advanced features such as categorization, real-time search, and cross-device synchronization.

movies-api.title: Movies API - A REST API of movies
movies-api.description: A complete REST API for movie data management with CRUD functionality that uses the MVC architecture, connected to a MySQL database.

projects_page.title: Projects
projects_page.subtitle: // code that made it to production

projects_page.no_results_hint: Try another category or clear the search

veritrust.title: VeriTrust — AI medical misinformation detector
veritrust.desc: AI-powered medical misinformation detector that analyzes claims through a multi-agent pipeline and returns verdicts with confidence scores and biomedical sources. Next.js frontend with a FastAPI + LangGraph backend and a fine-tuned BioBERT classifier.
highlights: Multi-agent verification pipeline orchestrated with LangGraph
Fine-tuned BioBERT classifier trained on the PUBHEALTH dataset
Evidence retrieval from the Europe PMC biomedical API

kmpe.title: Kilómetros por Explorar — Travel landing page
kmpe.desc: Landing page for a travel-planning business co-founded with my partner. Built with Astro, Preact and Tailwind CSS, with interactive client islands and an Express backend.
highlights: Islands architecture with Preact to keep the bundle minimal
Express backend with endpoints for bookings and inquiries
Responsive, SEO-optimized design from day one

notes_app.title: SnapNotes — Web-based notes app
notes_app.desc: Productivity web app with categorization, real-time search and cross-device sync. Modern stack with Next.js and Prisma on Postgres.

movies-api.title: Movies API — REST API for movies
movies-api.desc: Complete REST API for movie data management with full CRUD, MVC architecture on top of MySQL and deployed on GCP.
highlights: Clean MVC architecture with TypeScript and Express
Persistence in MySQL with versioned migrations
Deployed on GCP with a reproducible pipeline

about.title: About me

introduction.part1: I started coding at 15, and since then, I've been learning several programming languages and technologies through courses and certificactions, and later at university. Currently, I am studying the last year of my
introduction.highlight: Bachelor Degree in Computer Science and Engineering
introduction.part2: at University Carlos III de Madrid.

skills.part1: Currently my focus is on full stack development, so the languages I master the most are
skills.part2: I have also worked on several projects with the cloud, especially with
skills.part3: using relational databases like MySQL or SQL Server and NoSQL like MongoDB.

about.goal: My goal is to continue constantly learning, acquiring new technologies, and staying up to date with emerging technologies, especially those related to AI and automation.
